characterName: Wei Yang - Side Walk Cycle HD (Stabilized Anchor)
description: HD 16-frame side-view walk cycle re-cut with one global scale and fixed head/torso anchor so the character stays in place while legs move.
style: HD redrawn anime side-walk spritesheet, transparent PNG, stabilized rectangular frames
prompt: High-detail reference-locked side-view walking cycle; stabilized locally with global head/torso anchor.
